buttons.label: Карта
buttons.layoutNote: centered by position only, not larger

buttons.label: Место
buttons.artNote: standalone magnifying glass only; no tiles or clue props

implementationNotes: Use the atlas rects as source crops or as sprite-frame metadata.
Normalize all buttons to the same runtime box despite minor source width variance.
Draw text labels with the engine text renderer over the lower trough; do not bake labels into PNG.
Do not clip icons by a mask unless an icon exceeds the safe area.
If resizing the base art, preserve frame corners/bevels with 9-slice or uniform scaling.
